summary:
END TIME PROPHECY AND TIMELINES: Brandon interviews Pastor Steve Cioccolanti regarding current global events, the Israeli war, and their relation to biblical end-time prophecies. The discussion explores how timelines are derived through scriptural study, referencing Daniel chapter 9 as an example of exact calculation. The conversation asserts that the world is currently in a pre-tribulation phase as described in Revelation 6. The opening of the seals is mapped to recent history, with the white horse's timeline spanning from January 2000 to June 2023, correlating with the end of global health emergencies. The subsequent red horse period, expected to last three and a half years, is linked to events sparked by Islamic factions, referencing the French riots, the Maui fires, and the October 7th attacks.

GEOPOLITICS AND ECONOMIC SHIFTS: Brandon and Steve discuss the geopolitical landscape, focusing on the Middle East and global economic realignments. They examine Saudi Arabia's pivot toward alliances with China and Russia, aiming to replace the US petrodollar with the BRICS system. This economic shift is connected to the biblical black horse, which is interpreted as representing oil and its impact on global commerce. The manipulation of oil prices is described as a strategy to trigger global inflation, food shortages, and famine, emphasizing that control over transportation directly affects commodity prices. The political climate in South America is also mentioned, noting a conservative shift in Argentina as a counter to Marxist movements in countries like Brazil.

BIBLICAL CONNECTIONS AND FUTURE PLAGUES: Brandon's discussion delves into the linguistic and historical connections found in the Bible, specifically noting that the word Hamas appears in Genesis 6:1 in association with violence preceding Noah's flood. This ancient reference is seen as a direct foreshadowing of the October 7th events. The eschatological timeline continues with an analysis of the pale horse, identified by its Greek root chloros meaning green. This horse is prophesied to represent a future plague that will result in the death of 350 million people, occurring after the three-and-a-half-year period of the black horse. The timing of the rapture is speculated to align with the anniversary of Jesus's resurrection, providing an estimated ten-year window leading up to 2033 for individuals to prepare.

AMERICA IN PROPHECY AND GEORGE WASHINGTONS VISION: Brandon explores the prophetic role of the United States, referencing a vision received by George Washington. This vision describes three great perils facing the Republic, with the third being a global union of nations from Europe, Asia, and Africa turning against America. The narrative describes hordes of armed men invading the country by land and sea, destroying cities and villages. However, the vision concludes with divine intervention, where legions of angels assist the American inhabitants in achieving victory and restoring the nation. The conversation emphasizes that America is fundamentally a Christian nation founded on a covenant with God, rejecting the concept of the separation of church and state in favor of public religious expression and civic duty.

DIVINE CORRECTION AND THE CALL TO ACTION: Brandon recounts a personal vision of the pilgrims at Plymouth Rock dedicating the land to the Lord, asserting that God still honors this original covenant. Instead of final judgment, America is slated for a period of divine correction and shaking intended to awaken the population. There is a strong call to action for Christians to abandon cowardice, actively participate in elections, and advocate for biblical justice and morality within the government. Pastors and believers are urged to reject compromised teachings, embrace boldness, teach their families godly principles, and prepare practically by securing physical resources like gold, silver, and ammunition in response to impending societal challenges.
rawData: [October 24, 2023]-[ls the Israel - Hamas war the beginning of WW3 - when is the rapture - featuring Steve Cioccolanti]-[https://youtu.be/wtPa21KV2Iw]-[Good morning, family. I'm excited to be with you all today. I have a special guest, Pastor Steve Cioccolanti from Discover Church, and we're excited. We're going to interview him about some of the things that are happening in the tribulation and in the world right now with the Israeli war. We're going to ask him some questions, the hard stuff. He has a lot of wisdom on Bible prophecy and end-time events, so we're going to pick his brain on where we are in the end times. I'm excited to have him as a special guest on our channel today. Hey, Pastor Steve. So good to be with you, Brandon. This morning the Lord said to me, 'My servant Brandon is waiting for you.' He called you 'my servant,' just like he called John the Revelator 'my servant.' That's beautiful; we talked about that last time. A lot of technical difficulties and issues tried to keep us apart, but we are together now. Praise the Lord, I'm excited. Praise God. We have some questions for you, and I'm going to start off with this: how long is this war going to last? That's what people want to know. Is this going to be a short event that's going to last for a couple of months, or do you see this going on as a major event that would take years, similar to the Gulf War? Because we're still kind of in Iraq. What do you think about that in Daniel chapter 9? Talking about the ministry of the prophet, how does a prophet operate? People think it's airy-fairy, like we're praying and then suddenly we're going to be dropped a date or a timeline. Sometimes you get that, but it's very rare. Daniel chapter 9 is actually one of those rare moments where you get the timeline calculated to the exact day of Jesus's first coming. My question is, how did it start? It actually started with Daniel studying the word of God, and he says so. It's important that all prophets speaking correctly for the Lord need to go back to the Bible. It says here in Daniel 9:1, 'In the first year of Darius the son of Ahasuerus of the seed of the Medes, which was made king over the realm of the Chaldeans, in the first year of his reign, I Daniel understood by books the number of the years whereof the word of the Lord came to Jeremiah the prophet that he would accomplish 70 years in the desolations of Jerusalem.' This whole big revelation that he's about to get starts off with him studying books, specifically Bible books. He doesn't explain all the books because he said plural, but he says specifically Jeremiah said we're going to be held captive, deported, and then held in Babylon for 70 years. I got that now, and I'm going to act on that by going to pray. So, a prophet is first a student of the word and a teacher of the word, and then secondly, a prayer warrior. That's what people need to understand when they're asking about the timeline. We don't just go and make up a timeline; we have to go and study the books, the biblical books. What my studies have shown is that we are in pre-tribulation and that some people need to correct their assumptions and theology that they've heard that's 30, 40, or 50 years old, but now we have more light. Revelation 6, representing the seals, are not tribulation seals. That doesn't mean the tribulation has started or that we missed the rapture; it means they're pre-tribulation. God emphasized this so much. The first horse is the white horse. Its gallop we can now pinpoint exactly from January 2000 to June 2023 when basically most of the world has opened up. Nobody's got a health emergency; if they do, it's a bit scoffed at. Airplanes and airlines are not testing you for COVID before you get on the flights, and that's very exact: three and a half years. So, we're going to ask the question: how long do we have in this next war? I would say whether it's this war, an escalation of this war, a spreading of the war, or some kind of war, it's going to last three and a half years. Three and a half years from June 2023, at which point we had the French riots, and again it was sparked by Muslims. It was the killing at a traffic stop of a guy that was a known criminal with a rap sheet and was underage. He shouldn't have been driving, but they turned it into a religious war where they said, 'White French police killed a Muslim truck driver.' They didn't say anything about his history; he's a criminal basically, but then they used that to instigate continental-wide riots. It's a sign that the Red Horse has something to do with Islam. But then it spread to the fires of Maui—something very strange because a 'great sword' is mentioned in the Red Horse. Back then they didn't have directed energy weapons or things like EMPs, electromagnetic pulse bombs. So all John could say was there was a great sword. We are exactly in the timeline and then we come to October 7th and we have this thing that took all of us by surprise, but we know we're in the zone of the Red Horse. So far the theory pans out. Now, the theory can be falsified: if we have just perfect peace in the next two and a half years, then we're done. We're going to say we're not in the pre-tribulation signs and the horse is not galloping, but so far everything is working. I would remind you of your own revelation from God that lines up with Revelation 6 about Saudi Arabia and the price of oil. When the Lord told me, he said, 'When this happens, oil will go over $200 a barrel and it will be a major event all around the world.' He told me people are going to become angry at Israel because of what's about to happen. It would be like anti-Semitism, where they were blaming them because of what happens. I guess it's a retaliation from Israel doing something to another country in the Middle East, and I believe it to be Iran and Saudi Arabia. The Lord showed me that the prince of Saudi Arabia was going to join forces with China and Russia and make secret deals. I believe all this is just going to keep escalating. Well, there's news coming out right now that their plan basically is to create the BRICS system to replace the US petrodollar, and Saudi Arabia is the linchpin of the US petrodollar system. The reason that America can be, if I may say, not so productive in manufacturing and not really an economic powerhouse is because we're just a bunch of spenders and consumers. How is that possible? Because it's the one currency in the world that everybody has to use to buy petrol and other commodities. Usually other commodities like gold are denominated in US dollars. So the US dollar has this unnatural privileged position that Saudi Arabia and Brazil—which has now turned very radically left—have challenged. It went from conservative under Bolsonaro to now Lula, who's a Marxist. The news today that I was reading in the morning was that Argentina looks like it's going to flip to the conservative side and the Marxists are freaking out because they want more nations to come into their oligarchy, their system. You have to pick your bad guy. It's not that American domination has produced world peace, but American being the superpower is probably better than China, communist Brazil, and whoever else is going to join this BRICS system. They're losing their grip on Argentina if the election goes through the way the people want to vote. They want a populist man who's an economist and very well-read. He totally dislikes communism and says he won't even trade with China and Brazil because they're communist. We're winning on many fronts. We Christians are praying the right prayer. We're not just saying, 'Slap us one way, kill our baby, kill another baby.' We're saying enough is enough. We have authority on the earth to exert Jesus's standards and his righteousness without becoming pharisaical and legalistic. We've corrected that part, but now we've swung so far to the grace part that we've lost touch with any sense of morality and justice. Making peace with the devil is what the body of Christ is doing. We're coming to a balance where we have to learn biblical justice. That's really the main thing. That's the main thing I keep drumming to every church member: get a hold of biblical justice and understand what it's about. Back to Saudi Arabia. Saudi Arabia obviously wants to change the system. They're not going to have oil forever. They want to make profitable alliances with China. They're only thinking about money, not morality and prophecy. But all of it is going to end up fulfilling prophecy according to my interpretation of Revelation 6. You've got another three years of the red horse. Then, exactly when that ends, we should see the black horse. What color is black that the whole world has to consume? It's petrol. The black horse is indicating that something's going to happen to oil, and it lines up with what God has shown you, Brandon. Saudi Arabia is trying to disrupt or threaten America when it's weak. I think it can do it when Biden is in, but I don't think it can do it when Trump is in. The process may start, but if you're trading, don't ever make financial decisions based on words of prophecy because God does not give us the exact timeline unless it's a Daniel 9 moment. Revelation 6 is very close to a Daniel 9 moment. Money is going to be the last thing you're thinking about when there's global famine. The black horse represents oil; it doesn't represent global famine. They tie into each other because the price of every commodity is tied to the price of transportation. If oil goes up, your food goes up. If you're a globalist trying to make people starve, you don't have to go to every corn, wheat, or barley farmer. You can attack a country like Ukraine, which is a major supplier of food. That's one way to make the price go up. But if you just control the price of oil, you can raise the price of everything people depend on to live. Trump understood that. He said, 'I'm not going to deal with every industry, but I'm going to deal with OPEC and Saudi Arabia. I'm going to make sure they produce enough oil and we are going to become energy independent ourselves as Americans.' Everybody's standard of living was higher because the price of everything was lower. He did that by addressing oil. Biden is doing the opposite. People who are supporting Biden just need to check their bank accounts and bills to see the inflation is much higher than they're revealing. The official stats must not be accurate because people feel the pain. They're tied in. The black horse uses black as a symbol for you to know what we are talking about. Oil is black. It's the blackest thing anybody deals with every day. It's tied into the global famine because when food shortages come, it will be related to lack of transportation—companies and sea freight shipping businesses going out of business or stalling. We saw a little bit of that at the beginning of the coronavirus pandemic. That wasn't the fulfillment of the black horse, just a little taste—a foreshadowing. Types and shadows are going on all the time, but the fulfillment is clear. Plagues and epidemics happen all over the world, but coronavirus was the fulfillment of a global pandemic with a 'corona,' which is the Latin word for 'crown.' The crown given to the white horse is called corona. It's so precise and amazing. So when would the green horse—the pale horse, the chloros horse—appear? People debate this. They haven't updated their eschatology in years and they want to debate us. You need to study first before you say it's called the pale horse in English, but in Greek, it's chloros. Chloros is green. Words like chlorophyll come from chloros. It's a green horse. I believe it's a plague that kills 350 million people. The black horse happens first for three and a half years, and then we're going to see another three and a half years of a plague. After that takes place, do you see the rapture of the church coming soon? I think the ideal window is the anniversary of Jesus's resurrection. He was resurrected, and 2,000 years later, the dead in Christ are resurrected, and we who remain get raptured. It would be a perfect fulfillment. But God has his own calendar. We could have slight miscalculations, but we're not far off. We have a good 10 years to get our lives right, stop sinning, and go on missions. Americans are the most blessed yet spoiled Christians. Your standard of living in America far exceeds most of the world. As a Christian, we waste so much money in America building empty churches. If you have those resources, preach the gospel in Thailand or come with me to Saudi Arabia in February. Get out of your comfort zone because you were blessed to be a blessing. If you're not a blessing, the blessing is going to dry up. And that's what I fear for America: we're like spoiled children who have wasted our inheritance so much that we didn't get the gospel out to the world the way we should have. We just spent, consumed, and lived in luxury, and I can see why a lot of people say America could be Babylon, although I don't hold that view. I think America still has a great future. You do? Wow. Praise God. Well, you're looking at a ten-year window until 2033. Is that the window you're believing in? Do you think Hamas will be crushed and just completely destroyed? Well, let me get to the Bible about Hamas, because it's very interesting. There's a 'law of first mention' in the Bible: when a word appears for the first time, it has extreme prophetic significance for that time, but also prophetically, it's going to keep playing up—it's going to keep appearing. Did you know that Hamas appears in the Book of Genesis? Wow. No, I did not know that. Yeah. And people want to play word games and linguistics with prophecy teachers and say, 'Oh no, this word is in the wrong language.' But God knows all the languages, and He knew in Hebrew that this word would be used in Arabic 2,000 years later. So look at the first instance of the word Hamas. Okay, here it is: Genesis 6:1. 'The earth also was corrupt before God; the earth was filled with violence.' The word is chamas, and the word earth is eretz. So it's a play on words; it has a double entendre. Earth in the Bible can mean the globe—the whole planet—or it can also mean the land of Israel. So read this: 'The eretz was filled with Hamas.' That's Genesis 6:1. That's describing October 7, 2023, and that was written 4,000 years ago. And the event was 5,000 years ago, just before Noah's flood. So what did Jesus say? 'As it was in the days of Noah.' How was it in the days of Noah? It was filled with chamas. My gosh, that is amazing. It's all so perfect. I mean, you can't make this stuff up. It's just awesome. From Genesis to Revelation, it's just all... wow. That is so cool. Where is America at in Bible prophecy? Well, America has such a special place, right? America is a nation that was founded on religious freedom, and I don't think God's going to give up on that, and we must not give up on America. In fact, I believe that God sends me to America, and I'm going from church to church. I've started doing it. Those of you who are pastors who are listening to me, I'm not far away. You can get me to come and speak to your church. But He told me, God told me, that I've come to be part of the Third Great Awakening. So I believe that God doesn't waste resources and time. I wouldn't be here coming to the United States just to tickle some ears. No, there's a massive movement. I think we are winning. Just like I said, Argentina is turning conservative. If they don't rig and steal the election, we're winning on that front. Roe v. Wade has been overturned. We're winning on that front. The Lemon test—that all laws are to be secular and pass a secular test in America—we've overturned that. We've won on that front. We're winning and winning and winning, and we're winning under Joe Biden. Can you imagine this? God didn't even need a Republican to be in office; He can still win. God is that powerful. He's a mighty, mighty God. So, we've got to go back to the roots of America and realize that all the things that have happened are not taking God by surprise. When George Washington—whom people misrepresent because there was a painting that looks like he's a Freemason... by the way, that painting is a recent painting; he's not a Freemason. He was invited, like any president or any important person, to go to a Mason meeting, and he went sometime, but he said, 'No, I'm not a Mason.' He believes Jesus; he believes the Bible. Well, he was given prophecies about the nation, which is called the Republic. He never ever called it a democracy. They were afraid of the concept of democracy. They said, 'No, we're a republic, right? A constitutional republic that protects the rights of minorities against the hordes of the majority and the whims of the majority.' And he got three visions, and he was told that America would go through certain crises. One of them was obviously the 1865 Civil War. So he was told this, and I'm going to read this. This is a prophecy from President George Washington about this nation. Americans need to know about this. It's called the Third Peril. The scene instantly began to fade and dissolve. He wrote this down; they all took prophecy very seriously. Can you imagine that? That's 250 years ago. So, is this a vision, do you think? This is a vision that George Washington was given by the Lord, and he wrote it down. 'I at last saw nothing but the rising, curling vapor I at first beheld. This also disappearing, I found myself once more gazing at the mysterious visitor who, in the same voice I had heard before, said, Son of the Republic.' So the angel calls him, 'Son of the Republic.' What you have seen is thus interpreted: 'Three great perils will come upon the Republic. The most fearful is the third, passing which the whole world united shall not prevail against her.' So the whole world will hate America and unite against America but will not prevail against her. Wow. Let every child of the Republic learn to live for his God, his land, and the Union. We are to learn to live for God. We don't naturally know, as born-again Christians—as baby Christians going to church—we don't know how to live for God. There is a skill, there is a training to live for God: to get up in the morning and not just go brush your teeth, but fall on your knees and say, 'Hallelujah. Praise God. Good morning, Heavenly Father. Good morning, Holy Spirit. I bless the name of Jesus.' Yes, there's a way to live for God, right? So, learn to live for his God and his land. A lot of Christians forgot this. We preserve the land; we're the salt of the earth. So, for us to say we have no civic duty, we ignore voting, or our vote doesn't count anyway, is an absolute abdication of our rights, our authority, and our civic duties. None of the founding fathers believed in that. None of the prophets believed in that. Some of them served in the highest political offices of their land. You can think of Joseph, you can think of Daniel, and this is our destiny. He said, 'Again, I heard the mysterious voice saying, Son of the Republic, look and learn.' At this, the dark, shadowy angel placed a trumpet to his mouth and blew three distinct blasts. And taking water from the ocean, he sprinkled it upon Europe, Asia, and Africa. So there's an order to how things are going to unfold: Europe, Asia, and then Africa. Then my eyes beheld a fearful scene: from each of these countries arose thick black clouds that were joined into one. This is the globalist trend that we're seeing. It starts in Europe because the Western powers—it's the Western oligarchs, the same colonizers doing it now with technology. The same spirit that went butchering people all over Asia and Africa; they're now doing it through the IMF and debts and creating slaves through financial instruments. It's the same people. So they said it starts in Europe. Who's going to grab it next? Asia will grab it. Asians love anything European, anything American; they just go for it. And Africa's last. Africa will be the last to develop and become bondservants, again slaves. They're going under slavery again to the IMF, World Bank, American institutions, and European institutions. The Americans and the Europeans are the ones saying, 'You have to cut your carbon. You have to not grow certain foods,' and then they starve these people to death. They say, 'You have to buy this fertilizer from us.' They're creating all these laws. 'This will be illegal,' they say. It's the European powers that are dictating these things. So he said, 'Watch; the black cloud arises from Europe first, but it's going to join into one with these other two continents.' Back then, that was the whole world because they didn't know about Australia or America. That's the whole world joining. Then my eyes beheld a fearful scene: from each of these countries, black clouds rose and joined into one. And throughout this mass, there gleamed a dark red light—is that like the red horse? Wow—by which I saw hordes of armed men. So this is Islamic now, isn't it? The hordes of armed men moving with the cloud marched by land and sailed by sea to America. Wow, that's the southern border. He saw that coming by sea, coming by land. Of course, he doesn't know the airplane; that is amazing. The whole country was enveloped in the volume of the cloud. So, this is the whole illegal immigration invasion through the Taliban and Afghanistan. Now, Biden's going to open the country to one million Hamas sympathizers, and I dimly saw these vast armies devastate the whole country and burn the villages, towns, and cities that I beheld were springing up. So that's sad; it's going to happen. He's saying they set everything on fire. Well, we've already been seeing that since COVID for sure—you know, Black Lives Matter and Antifa. They were doing that while we were supposed to be locked down. So that's going to happen as my ears listen to the thundering of the cannon, clashing of the swords, and the shouts and cries of millions in mortal combat. That's why we have the Second Amendment. That's why I believe you should buy gold and silver, and I think you should buy guns and ammunition. That was part of the word that the Lord gave me about the ammunition recently. He told me the ammunition was going to become very hard to get here pretty soon. So, we want to talk about that in online church. Inside online church, we can talk about who is a gun expert, where to buy ammunition, and things like that, because they're going to make it harder and harder. I heard they're going to put like a 1,000% tax on AR-15s. Again, I heard the mysterious voice saying, 'Son of the Republic, look and learn.' When the voice had ceased, the dark shadowy angel placed his trumpet once more to his mouth and blew a long, fearful blast. Instantly, a light as of a thousand suns shone down from above me and pierced and broke into fragments the dark cloud which enveloped America. At the same moment, the angel upon whose head still shone the word 'Union' and who bore our national flag in one hand and a sword in the other—wow—descended from the heavens, attended by legions of white spirits. These immediately joined the inhabitants of America who I perceive were well-nigh overcome, but who immediately taking courage again, closed up their broken ranks and renewed the battle. That's what we're here for. We're here to renew the spirit of courage. It's enough of being so cowardly that we're not even willing to stand on what the Bible says lest we offend someone, lest we lose our job. It's time to stop being cowards. The Bible says cowards are the first group that goes to hell; they go to the lake of fire. It's the sin of not doing something out of fear. Cowardice is the sin of not doing something because we're intimidated. So, God's called me to come to the United States to preach in your churches, pastors. Yes, open it up. Don't be afraid anymore. We are on the winning side. Don't worry about your 501(c)(3); they cannot take that from you because you speak about morality in government. That is a biblical subject. You speak about biblical justice; you're not going to get in trouble for that. So, we're going to get courageous again and bold. He says again, amid the fearful noise of the conflict, I heard the mysterious voice saying, 'Son of the Republic, look and learn.' As the voice ceased, the shadowy angel for the last time dipped water from the ocean, sprinkled it upon America, and instantly the dark cloud rolled back together with the armies it had brought, leaving the inhabitants of the land victorious. Then once more I beheld the villages, towns, and cities springing up where I had seen them before, while the bright angel planting the azure standard—the blue standard he had brought in the midst of them—cried with a loud voice: 'While the stars remain and the heavens send down dew upon the earth, so long shall the Union stand.' And taking from his brow the crown on which was blazoned the word Union, he placed it upon the standard or the flag while the people, kneeling down, said, 'Amen.' We have to learn to kneel before God every day. Kneel. Teach your children to bow before Jesus. They're going to teach us to bow before climate change, before these false religions, and perversion. We learn to bow as a nation to Jesus. And don't apologize. We're a Christian nation. We don't believe in separation of church and state. What does that mean? We believe in freedom. Every nation on earth bows to a god. You don't apologize. When you enter into Saudi Arabia, you know it's a Muslim country. In Ramadan, they're not going to feed you food; they're fasting. You go to a Buddhist nation, you know that it's a Buddhist nation. They don't say, 'Oh, I believe in separation of our government and Buddha.' They say, 'No, this is a Buddhist festival. Everybody has a day off. Everyone's going to go and offer some incense.' Americans are the only nation really on earth, and I guess the Americas, that have been so secularized that we believe in this idea that God can be God in our personal life, but he's divorced and irrelevant to the rest of our lives. No, this is what we get when a nation decays and corrodes because we have tried to kick God out. And God says, 'No, I'm the God. I'm the creator. This is my land. I gave the land to you that you might worship me freely because you were persecuted by the Catholic Inquisition in Europe.' Then the Christians fled over to America escaping religious persecution. This land was dedicated to Christ. Praise God. Yes. It goes back to—I had a visitation. I was praying one night for America and I was interceding really, and I had an open-eyed vision. The Lord showed me the pilgrims at Plymouth Rock, and they were gathered around this massive rock there. They were taking communion, calling the nation for the Lord, and dedicating this land to the Lord. And the Lord said, 'Those prayers still echo before my throne. I still hear them.' And he said, 'I honor the covenant that I made with those settlers, the people that came for religious freedom.' And he said, 'Brandon, you look at judgment. Everybody's calling judgment on America.' He said, 'No. Correction is coming, and there's a great wake-up coming. There's an awakening.' And he said, 'It's going to be a shaking.' And he said, 'But it's not judgment.' He said true judgment is whenever you are separated from me for eternity. He said when you are in hell for eternity, that's true judgment. He said if you go through a little bit of a spanking in life, it's correction, and it's to lift you up so you don't go to hell for eternity. He said, "I made a covenant with your founding fathers, and I will honor that. This land will not become a goat nation; it will be a sheep nation." That's what He warned me about. He told me all these things that I see coming, but it's not the end; it's just to wake people up. Like Pastor Steve is talking to you all, the body of Christ is asleep and we're losing our freedoms that were given to us: religious freedom, the ability to pray, and seek His face. If we don't stand for something, look what's going on. If the Buddhists are doing it in China and the Muslims are doing it in Saudi Arabia, we need to stand for what we believe as Americans. We're a Christian nation founded on godly principles, and we have to stand for the Word, stand for our covenant rights, and say, "Enough is enough. You're not taking our rights and privileges away from us." We will pray in public. We will pray in our elections, and we're going to elect a godly person. It is so important, this election coming in 2024. You don't realize this is a make-or-break time. In my heart, we can go either into more darkness or we can turn around this ship and send it back into the light. We have an opportunity here to change things. Will you wake up and start preaching righteousness and holiness back in the pulpits, teaching the people to live a godly lifestyle and live unto the Lord? Fathers, teach your children the Word of God in these last days. Praying with your wife, praying as a family, anointing your kids with oil, taking communion, bringing them to church. Read the Bible. Wake up and say, "Good morning," to God and acknowledge His greatness. Teach your children. Be a good example. None of these things are hard, but it's almost like we're not hearing it anymore. They get lazy; I think they get spiritually dry. They're not being taught the Word that you're teaching at your church to live by faith. They're getting a lukewarm gospel, and they're not getting something to stir them up and get them excited about the Word every Sunday, to sit there and go, "Hey, I can go out and live this," instead of going, "Well, if I do, I do; if I don't, I don't. It really doesn't matter. I'm just going to go out and live like the world and be okay, and I'm going to make it by grace or whatever." So you're preaching a compromising gospel. A lot of pastors are; I've been to them. You sit there and you go, "What was this? I wasted my time." Pastor Steve, do you have any final words?
